tasks.title: Project Setup and Package Configuration
tasks.description: Initialize TypeScript project with dual ESM/CJS build, dev dependencies, and base configuration for Node.js 18+
tasks.details: Create package.json with 'name': 'ellucian-banner', 'type': 'module', Node 18+ engines, scripts: {'build': 'tsup', 'test': 'vitest', 'dev': 'vitest dev'}. Install dev deps: typescript@^5.0, tsup@^8.0, vitest@^1.0, @types/node@^20.0, jsdoc-to-markdown. Configure tsconfig.json (strict, ESM), tsup.config.ts (ESM+CJS+dts, format:'esm,cjs', clean:true). Add .npmignore, README.md skeleton.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify package.json scripts run without errors, tsup builds successfully, TypeScript compiles without errors

tasks.title: Error Hierarchy Implementation
tasks.description: Create comprehensive error class hierarchy for all Banner API error scenarios
tasks.details: In src/common/errors.ts: Extend Error with statusCode, response body. Implement BannerError (base), AuthError(401/403), NotFoundError(404), RateLimitError(429 with retryAfter), ValidationError(400), ServerError(5xx). Add fromResponse() factory method that parses fetch response and instantiates correct error type. Include JSDoc for all classes.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit test error constructors, fromResponse() factory with mock responses for each error type (401,403,404,429,400,500), verify properties populated correctly

tasks.title: HTTP Client Wrapper with Auth Headers
tasks.description: Build thin native fetch wrapper with automatic auth header injection and base configuration
tasks.details: In src/common/http-client.ts: Create HttpClient class with constructor(baseUrl, timeout=30000). Implement request() method that adds auth headers from token provider, configurable timeout, JSON serialization. Add debug logging (DEBUG env var). Support AbortController for timeout. Return {response, data, headers}.
tasks.testStrategy: Mock fetch, test header injection, timeout cancellation, JSON serialization, debug logging toggles, various HTTP methods

tasks.title: Ethos JWT Authentication Module
tasks.description: Implement API key to JWT token exchange with auto-refresh and in-memory caching
tasks.details: In src/auth/ethos-auth.ts: Create EthosAuth class with constructor(apiKey, baseUrl='https://integrate.elluciancloud.com', refreshBuffer=30000). Implement getToken(): Promise<string> with 5min expiry check + 30s buffer. POST /auth with Bearer apiKey. Cache token + expiry timestamp. Auto-refresh before expiry. Env var fallback: process.env.ETHOS_API_KEY. Validate inputs, throw AuthError on failure.
tasks.testStrategy: Mock fetch responses: success JWT, 401, network error. Test cache hit, refresh trigger (mock Date), expiry buffer, env var fallback, error handling

tasks.title: Banner Native Basic Auth Implementation
tasks.description: Add HTTP Basic Auth support for native Banner REST APIs
tasks.details: In src/auth/banner-auth.ts: Create BannerAuth class with constructor(baseUrl, username, password). Implement getAuthHeader(): string returning base64 'username:password'. Env var support: BANNER_BASE_URL, BANNER_USERNAME, BANNER_PASSWORD. Validate credentials present. Constructor params override env vars.
tasks.testStrategy: Test base64 encoding correctness, env var fallback, validation errors on missing credentials, header format validation

tasks.title: Retry Logic and Rate Limiting
tasks.description: Implement exponential backoff retry for 429/5xx with Retry-After header support
tasks.details: In src/common/retry.ts: Create retryRequest(fetchFn, maxRetries=3, baseDelay=1000). Exponential backoff: delay *= 2. Parse Retry-After header. Retry only 429/5xx (not other 4xx). Add jitter: delay += Math.random()*100. Throw RateLimitError on final 429. Integrate into HttpClient.request().
tasks.testStrategy: Mock fetch with delayed responses, test exponential backoff sequence, Retry-After parsing, jitter randomness, no-retry on 400/401, max retries exhaustion

tasks.title: Pagination Implementation with Async Generators
tasks.description: Add offset-based pagination with getPage() and getAll() async generator
tasks.details: In src/common/pagination.ts: Create Paginator class. getPage(offset, limit=25): {data, totalCount, offset, hasMore}. Parse x-total-count header. getAll(): async function* yields pages until !hasMore. Configurable pageSize. Integrate into HTTP client. Handle empty responses gracefully.
tasks.testStrategy: Mock paginated responses with x-total-count, test getPage() edge cases (offset=0, last page, empty), getAll() yields correct pages, stops at end, totalCount accuracy

tasks.title: Core Student Resource Type Definitions
tasks.description: Create TypeScript interfaces for Phase 1 EEDM resources (persons v12, students v16, etc.)
tasks.details: In src/ethos/types/: Define interfaces for persons(v12), students(v16), courses(v4), sections(v16), academic-periods(v16) matching EEDM schemas. Include GUID id: string, common fields (name, dates, etc.). Add ResourceType union. Export all types with JSDoc. Support generic Resource<T>.
tasks.testStrategy: TypeScript compile check, validate interfaces match expected EEDM structure via sample JSON validation

tasks.title: Ethos Proxy CRUD Client Implementation
tasks.description: Build typed CRUD operations for Ethos proxy API with EEDM version support
tasks.details: In src/ethos/client.ts: EthosClient with auth: EthosAuth. Implement get<T>(resource: string, id: string, version?: string), getAll<T>, create<T>, update<T>, delete(id). Set Accept/Content-Type: application/vnd.hedtech.integration.v{VERSION}+json. Default application/json. Use Paginator for list ops. Resource accessors: client.persons.get(id).
tasks.testStrategy: Mock HTTP responses for each CRUD method, test version headers, pagination integration, typed responses, resource accessor chain (client.ethos.persons.get)

tasks.title: EllucianBanner Client Builder and Integration Tests Setup
tasks.description: Create main client builder pattern and configure Vitest with 80% coverage
tasks.details: In src/index.ts: Export EllucianBanner builder with {apiKey, baseUrl?}. client.ethos = new EthosClient(auth). Add banner auth option. Configure vitest.config.ts (coverage: {80% threshold, include: ['src/**']}). Setup integration test suite gated by env vars. GitHub Actions: lint/test/build on PRs.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit test client instantiation (Ethos+Banner auth), integration tests against test instance (ETHOS_API_KEY env), coverage report >=80%

tasks.title: Unit Test Suite for Core Auth and HTTP Layers
tasks.description: Achieve 80%+ coverage for authentication, HTTP client, retry, pagination, and error handling
tasks.details: Create __tests__ for auth/ethos-auth.test.ts (token refresh, cache), common/http-client.test.ts, common/retry.test.ts, common/pagination.test.ts, common/errors.test.ts. Mock fetch globally with vitest. Test all code paths, edge cases, error scenarios. Use vi.mock('node-fetch') equivalent for native fetch.
tasks.testStrategy: Run vitest --coverage, verify 80%+ coverage on auth/HTTP/retry/pagination modules, all tests pass
